title: Install Codex wait discipline through always-loaded root doctrine and canonical skills
action: Continue the preserved bee-writing-skills RED state from dropped cell codex-agent-wait-loop-1; no feature wording has changed. Before changing any skill/doctrine wording, confirm the frozen RED payload and exact rationalizations are checkpointed in canonical bee-swarming/CREATION-LOG.md and copy only that feature section into the writable .claude creation log. Add a doctrine census assertion to canonical test_lib.mjs plus its .claude copy, run the canonical test against the old surfaces, and record the real RED command/output in both creation logs before proceeding. GREEN: add one concise always-loaded rule to the master AGENTS block, root AGENTS.md, and writable .claude AGENTS template. It must name wait_agent/list_agents, forbid an empty wait directly followed by wait_agent with no authority/urgency exception, and require the exact D3 interval: continue material task-local work or, only when none remains, take exactly one list_agents snapshot; then send concise commentary naming both live agent state and next action; only then may a later bounded wait occur. No-op work, repeated state reads, hidden reasoning, or commentary alone do not qualify. Timeout preserves every running agent, claim, and reservation and never licenses interrupt or duplicate dispatch. External process/artifact polling remains excluded. Mirror the procedure into canonical plus writable .claude routing-and-contracts and bee-swarming SKILL/reference, preserving silence-is-not-failure and unrelated projection drift. Do not attempt any .agents write; record test -w denial in the report and explain that root AGENTS.md is the current Codex enforcement surface while canonical skills are the future sync payload. Run one fresh review-tier pressure child at a time with fork_turns=none using the exact GREEN wrapper and frozen three scenario blocks in pressure-tests.md; it must read root AGENTS plus canonical ordinary-gather and swarming surfaces, choose B in all three, and state the exact D3 sequence. Record resolved prompt, verbatim output, and scoring immediately in both creation logs. Sync doctrine-layer.md. Run the narrow verify and then attempt the exact configured full repository verify; retain exact output, including nested-child sandbox denial if present, without relabeling it green. Do not change Codex UI/tool implementation, scheduling, timeout duration, external executor polling, .agents files, whole-tree projections, unrelated projection drift, or worktree-isolation artifacts.

truths: empty wait directly followed by wait_agent is explicitly forbidden with no authority or urgency exception

a later wait requires this exact interval: continue material task-local work or, only when none remains, take exactly one list_agents snapshot; then send concise commentary naming both live agent state and next action
no-op work, repeated state reads, hidden reasoning, generic commentary, or commentary without the material action does not qualify
timeout never implies failure and never triggers interrupt, duplicate dispatch, claim release, or reservation release
root AGENTS.md is the always-loaded live Codex enforcement surface and ordinary delegated gathers plus swarm workers inherit the rule
external CLI process and artifact polling remains outside the native-agent rule
one fresh review-tier child replays the frozen three scenarios with amended surfaces loaded and chooses the exact D3 sequence in all three
master, root, canonical procedure, and writable .claude surfaces are pinned by a failing-then-green feature-anchor census
.agents write denial is recorded explicitly and never represented as synchronized
the cell owns and records an attempt of the exact configured full repository verify after the narrow verify
artifacts: always-loaded wait discipline in master/root/.claude AGENTS doctrine
ordinary-gather tending contract in canonical/.claude routing-and-contracts.md
native Codex collection contract in canonical/.claude bee-swarming SKILL.md and swarming-reference.md
frozen replay protocol plus RED/GREEN exact evidence in canonical and .claude bee-swarming CREATION-LOG.md
feature-anchor doctrine census assertions in canonical and .claude test_lib.mjs
.agents read-only evidence plus full repository verify attempt output or exact sandbox-denial evidence in the worker report
key_links: pressure-tests.md frozen RED payload, GREEN wrapper, and scoring rubric
prohibitions: no consecutive wait_agent permission hidden behind vague useful-work wording
no no-op command, repeated inspection, hidden reasoning, generic commentary, or commentary-only loophole
no timeout-as-failure, interrupt, redispatch, claim release, or reservation release
no change to external CLI polling
no .agents write or false projection-parity claim
no whole-tree projection sync or reconciliation of unrelated projection drift
no skill wording before preserved RED evidence and RED census output are recorded

trace.outcome: Installed drift-anchored native Codex empty-wait discipline across live root doctrine, canonical and writable projections, with RED/GREEN pressure evidence and spec sync.
trace.friction: validation unclear/too expensive: the sandbox denied shell-wrapped nested child processes with empty output; direct narrow-test constituents passed and the full configured verify denial is retained explicitly.
